content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — login-gated app (SecureField in App/LoginView.swift:9) but demo credentials are placeholders (`test`/`changeme` in demo_user.txt/demo_password.txt) and notes.txt says only "TBD".
Pierre: Apple's reviewers need working credentials and actionable steps to reach your core features, or they reject the build under 2.1. Here the demo user/password are literal placeholders (`test`, `changeme`) and the review notes are just "TBD", which will not let a reviewer sign in or understand the flow. Replace them with a real functioning demo account and notes describing how to reach the app's key features.
